dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your contract overview
dashboard.monthlySpendingTooltip: Average monthly cost across all active contracts. Yearly amounts ÷ 12, quarterly ÷ 3, weekly × 4.3. One-time (lifetime) contracts are excluded.
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load dashboard data. Please refresh the page.

contractList.title: Contracts
contractList.noContracts: No contracts yet. Add your first contract above.
contractList.deleteError: Failed to delete contract. Please try again.

contractForm.amountInvalid: Amount must be a non-negative number.

import.title: Import Contracts
import.uploadHint: Supports .json and .xlsx files up to 5 MB
import.mappingHint: Review the column mapping below. {{count}} row(s) will be imported.
import.requiredFieldsMissing: Required fields (name, amount, billingInterval, category) must be mapped before confirming.
import.parseError: Could not read the file. Please check the format and try again.

result.summary: Import complete: {{created}} of {{total}} contract(s) created, {{failed}} failed.

anonymization.anonymizeContractHint: Always hide the name of this contract in the list view

auth.errorLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

accountsAdmin.title: Manage accounts
accountsAdmin.subtitle: Invite new family members and manage existing accounts.
accountsAdmin.inviteSuccess: Invitation sent! The invitee will receive an email with a link to set up their account.
accountsAdmin.inviteError: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
accountsAdmin.duplicateEmailError: This email address already has an account.
accountsAdmin.mailerError: The invitation email could not be sent. Please check the SMTP configuration.
accountsAdmin.actionError: The action could not be completed.
accountsAdmin.lastAdminError: Cannot remove the last active administrator.

acceptInvitation.title: Set up your account
acceptInvitation.successMessage: Your account is ready. You are now signed in.
acceptInvitation.alreadyUsed: This invitation link has already been used.
acceptInvitation.expired: This invitation link has expired. Ask the administrator for a new one.
acceptInvitation.noLongerValid: This invitation is no longer valid. Ask the administrator for a new one.
acceptInvitation.invalidLink: This invitation link is not valid.
acceptInvitation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
acceptInvitation.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

accountSettings.title: My account
accountSettings.subtitle: Update your password. You will need it the next time you sign in.
accountSettings.errorGeneric: Failed to change password. Please try again.
